since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.41%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -0.27% · Gold -0.94% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.41%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.41%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INOD is the standout at -7.19%
cards.body: Leaders: OKTA +4.37%, PANW +1.90%, CHKP +1.72%, MU +1.58%, CGNX +1.41%. Laggards: INOD -7.19%, SPCX -1.79%, PUBM -1.77%, RXRX -1.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.79% at $181.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
